calendar.matters:
Hearing On Plaintiff'S Motion To Apportion Settlement Funds.
Off Calendar May-19-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Motion to Distribute Settlement Funds.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq., of Brayton Purcell, LLP, appeared for all plaintiffs.
David A. Esquibias, Esq. appeared for the Zelda Ridone Trust, as Successor-in-Interest to the Estate of Frank Rindone, and individually for Loss of Consortium and as Wrongful Death Heir.
Bruce Thompson, Esq. appeared with Wrongful Death Heir William Rindone, who was placed under oath and examiend.

The Court, having reviewed the moving papers and having considered the evidence, both oral an documentary, and good cause appearing, it is hereby Ordered that the following are entitled to distribution of all net settlement funds from the underlying survival, loss of consortium, and wrongful death action, in the following proportions:

Zelda Ridone Trust, as Successor-in-Interest to the Estate of Frank Rindone, and individually for Loss of Consortium and as Wrongful Death Heir - 40%

William Rindone - Wrongful Death Heir - 60%

The law firm of Brayton Purcell LLP shall recover from the net settlement funds of $31,673.98 the sum of $867.00 as reasonable attorneys' fees and costs.

All future settlement funds shall be distributed in the percentages set forth above.

The signature of William Rindone shall be sufficient on all settlement documents and drafts for purposes of settling all claimants' claims with any defendants in the underlying asbestos survival, loss of consortium and wrongful death action.

Order Granting the Motion to Distribute Settlement Funds was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Apportionment Proceeding And For An Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar May-19-2009 Granted Per Written Order
